action: Specify a deterministic provenance-preserving reconciler for ACTIVE_QUEUE.json plus additive owner-scoped queue updates, surfacing conflicts instead of overwriting history.

progress.verification: GitHub acknowledged both new files; the contract preserves baseline and update provenance, defines deterministic ordering, rejects owner mismatches, and emits unresolved conflicts rather than arbitrary winners.
progress.privacy_boundary: Public repository state and abstract project relations only.

handoff: Next continuity item should implement the executable reconciler with deterministic fixtures for supersession, owner mismatch, incomparable conflicting updates, handoff-without-reopen, complete provenance, and byte-identical repeated output.
